---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Ocultar
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Edu963
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have already tried or considered.

## Use Case / Regulatory Context
Which use case or compliance requirement drives this request? (e.g., HIPAA, GDPR, CCPA, internal policy)

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
